_comment: Catalog of stock Apple iPod firmware for `flashpod flash`. When no --firmware is given, flashpod offers this list, downloads the chosen image from base_url + file, caches it under ~/.cache/flashpod, and verifies it against sha256. The .ipsw files are NOT bundled with flashpod (they are Apple's copyright); they are hosted as GitHub release assets. You can always bring your own with `--firmware <file>` (no network). Apple ipsw naming: iPod_<family>.<version>.ipsw (family 1 = 1G/2G, 2 = 3G, 4/10 = 4G grayscale, 5 = photo, 11 = color).

firmwares.description: Last stock Apple-released firmware for 1G/2G iPods
Last stock Apple-released firmware for 4G grayscale (family 4)
Last stock Apple-released firmware for the family-10 4G grayscale hardware revision
Last stock Apple-released firmware for iPod photo (family 5)
Last stock Apple-released firmware for the family-11 color-display revision
